query: /nerdbot enrich ./knowledge-base/wiki/topics/vendor-landscape.md using the new evidence in ./knowledge-base/raw/extracts/vendor-brief-2026.md
expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to the Enrich workflow based on the explicit '/nerdbot enrich' invocation
Agent loads references/kb-operations.md and references/page-templates.md before shaping the next wiki edit
Agent synthesizes only from raw evidence or declared canonical material instead of freewriting unsupported content
Agent refreshes provenance links and the affected source-map or coverage rows in the same batch as the wiki edit
Agent preserves user-authored voice by extending, annotating, or supplementing instead of blindly rewriting canonical material
Agent appends an activity-log entry that records the enrich batch and any remaining open questions
